Interface IImageResult

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Image Result Interface.

[Guid("BE47D208-D27A-4048-A118-C9167662DB74")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IImageResult

Properties

Height

The height of the image in pixels.

int Height { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MimeData

Binary data representing the generated image.

byte[] MimeData { get; }

Property Value

byte[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

MimeType

The MIME type of the generated image.

string MimeType { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceDPI

The device resolution of the image specified in the request (dots per inch).

double ReferenceDPI { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

URL

The URL of the generated image.

string URL { get; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

Width

The width of the image in pixels.

int Width { get; }

int
